tasks.label: Build JammaLib (Debug x64)
args: $msbuild = & "$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find "MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe" | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $msbuild) { throw "MSBuild.exe not found." }; & $msbuild "${workspaceFolder}\JammaLib\JammaLib.vcxproj" /m /t:Build /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 "/p:SolutionDir=${workspaceFolder}\"

tasks.label: Build Jamma (Debug x64)
args: $msbuild = & "$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find "MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe" | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $msbuild) { throw "MSBuild.exe not found." }; & $msbuild "${workspaceFolder}\Jamma\Jamma.vcxproj" /m /t:Build /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 "/p:SolutionDir=${workspaceFolder}\"

tasks.label: Build JammaLib_Tests (Debug x64)
args: $msbuild = & "$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find "MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe" | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $msbuild) { throw "MSBuild.exe not found." }; & $msbuild "${workspaceFolder}\test\JammaLib_Tests\JammaLib_Tests.vcxproj" /m /t:Build /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 "/p:SolutionDir=${workspaceFolder}\"

tasks.label: Build Solution (Debug x64)
args: $msbuild = & "$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find "MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe" | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $msbuild) { throw "MSBuild.exe not found." }; & $msbuild "${workspaceFolder}\Jamma.sln" /m /t:Build /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 /p:VcpkgEnableManifest=true
